name: premiere-editor
title: Premiere-style Video Editor
description: Editable Premiere Pro editor graded against real Adobe Video frames (reference/premiere/2026-07-09/yt-frame-*): violet media clips with filmstrip bodies and fx badges, magenta graphics/caption clips, olive/orange audio waveforms, scene-still project thumbnails and soft-footage monitors. Video editing, timeline manipulation, captions, clip trimming, and review workflow scenes.
